transcript.text:
Hello everyone
I prepared crayfish today
These used to be only served steamed
Now we are able to get them raw
There are other names like 'spiny lobster'
This one is 3.5kg
Here we have 4 smaller of the ones prepared in sashimi
Since this is the first bite
Bon appetit
It's so good
Eating it raw is amazing
The tail part is more solid due to its strength
Eating the tail raw is so delicious
Very tasty
[Chat: You're chewing it a lot]
The sweetness keeps coming out

It's good like that
I feel like this will be gone so fast
Didn't I do a good job making the sashimi?
They say that it's hard to fillet a lobster
I think I did a good job
That was so little
This is the head
Its shell is not too thick
Amazing The guts
It's yellow So good
I'm hungry
I bought these from the internet
They arrived fresh and alive
Yellow guts
The meat..
Can you see the spikes?

They said the meat under the spike is delicious
Let's try it
I'm blushing because everyone is saying I look good with my new hair
This is all meat
[Chat: Does it taste similar to lobsters or king crabs?]
It's closer to a lobster
The meat from the body tastes better than a lobster
Its tail strength is very strong, so it's hard
So it goes well as sashimi
Done
I'll show you the steamed one now
It's full of meat
Steamed is delicious too
Are they all different?
Fire chicken sauce
It's the carbonara one

Dip it in
As for the meat,
It's very chewy
It's spicy
I wonder if it will be good with sesame oil
This time,
Should I just eat this now?
Let's move these for a bit
I'll put them here for now for some space
This guy is too big for it to be with the others
This one definitely tastes more like a lobster
This one came cooked, so it's a bit salty
I like the raw crayfish
It was way better
It's very tender
This one is tender, the sashimi was chewy

Or is it just flimsy?
[Chat: Show us the guts]
I don't think it has any left It spilt out everything
Let's open it up anyway
See? Nothing in here
Having it delivered pre-steamed is not too good It's black in here
So much better getting them alive
The tail meat is very solid
The head meat is tender
I'll cut this
It's too tough to chew
It won't even cut
Maybe it's steamed incorrectly It's too hard
[Chat: Is it similar to the fish sashimi?]
I'll do the explanation Hold on
A taste review

Let me try 1 more
It's more similar to the scallop sashimi than a fish sashimi
The outer layer is very soft
The inside is a bit chewy
I can't cut it
[Chat: That does not look too appetizing] You're right, it's not good
It's too tough
I can't chew it
I will choke on it if I swallow it right now
I will just eat the sashimi
These are so much better
It's delicious
I will need to shred it
If I can't manage to chew it, then I'm sure most of you guys can't either
The crayfish are different from lobsters They don't have claws
[Chat: Then how do they fight back?]

This
Is it not?
No idea
The guts
This is why you need to get them alive
Oh no
No trashcan here
This one is full of meat
Yellow guts again
Hi
Thank you for having yellow guts
What to do
It's a mess I want to show you guys
Let's put it on a tray
I should've done it earlier
Looks good right? Imagine it butter-grilled

Can you tell it apart from a lobster?
Lobsters only have this much meat
But this is all meat
Tasty
Let's get the head
And cook it in Ramyun
Should I get noodles?
This is not enough food for me
Let's see if the red meat tastes different from the white meat
I can't tell the difference in taste
The texture is different
Yummy
I should put 1 head in the noodles, right?
Putting 2 in is a waste
Let me try to pull it out
I'll pick the meat out

And cook the head with Ramyun
Yes, let's do that
Sashimi
I did a good job filleting it
I really love the texture
Can you hear that?
Ouch
You gotta cook the Ramyun in hot boiling water
It looks like it's at a sauna How is it?
Bon appetit
I need more ice
That scared me
The crayfish were alive when they got here
And I was scared of them
I was just thinking about it
Jingu walked by and I thought it was a crayfish

[Chat: You're like Ponyo]
[Singing Ponyo theme song] What was it again?
[Chat: I just ate beef small intestine stew] Did you really?
That's much better than Ramyun
Yes, I got a haircut
I'm a new Mukbang Youtuber
Tzuh-yang
I finished it
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
